evidence_summary: The martian_warriors are a highly disciplined military force of massive, 15-foot tall humanoids. They possess olive-green skin, red eyes, tusks, and four arms. In combat or transit, they are often seen mounted on slate-colored, eight-legged animals, equippe...
Standard Martian warrior gear equipped with long-range white metal rifles.
Highly disciplined, organized, and valuing physical prowess; prone to mocking those who struggle physically.
